paragraphs: Systems Engineer and Fullstack Developer with experience designing and maintaining web platforms for condominiums, universities, and industry. I currently lead the development of a comprehensive management platform for SIAC Condominios, with a hybrid architecture combining SQL Server and MySQL, and coordinate a team of developers at PBT SRL using agile methodologies (Scrum and Kanban).

My work combines software architecture, database optimization, and AI-powered automation —including the implementation of an AI Chat Bot— to solve real problems and improve the user experience. With a solid foundation in PHP, Laravel, Livewire, WordPress, Joomla, and relational databases, I focus on building efficient, scalable, well-documented solutions, without losing sight of technical support and the continuous improvement of production systems.
